name: Developer Onboarding
description: Generate a new-developer onboarding guide for the project

input.command: cat Makefile 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo 'No Makefile'; echo '---'; cat package.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f"  npm run {k}: {v}") for k,v in d.get("scripts",{}).items()]' 2>/dev/null || true

cat .env.example 2>/dev/null || cat .env.template 2>/dev/null || echo 'No env template'; echo '---'; cat .tool-versions 2>/dev/null || cat .node-version 2>/dev/null || cat .python-version 2>/dev/null || echo 'No version file'
